name: HPC SYSTEMS Inc.
summary: HPC SYSTEMS Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells high-performance and embedded computers in Japan. Its principal products are cluster computers and personal cluster systems. The company is also specializes in science and technology calculations; and provides consulting services. It serves research institutes, including government labs, universities, and multi-national corporate research and development centers. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
